raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX there was a unauthorized purchase on my XXXX bank credit card for a two purchases ( Order Number : XXXX ) ( Order Number : XXXX ) on XXXX  's XXXX XXXX ( XXXX XXXX Case XXXX ). I explained to XXXX bank that someone else used this credit card to make this purchase and they did a chargeback and mailed me a new card. However Sony has suspended my account and is refusing to unsuspended it until I pay them {$55.00} for a purchase that I did not make or authorize.
